segments.speaker: 题目2
segments.text: I don't know how many people will join us tonight for study group.

segments.speaker: 题目4
segments.text: Peter said he would look for supplies.

segments.speaker: 题目5
segments.text: Why is your desk so cluttered?

segments.speaker: 题目6
segments.text: Maybe the power went out for this whole area.

segments.speaker: 题目7
segments.text: Which bus goes from campus to city center?

segments.speaker: 题目8
segments.text: When is our return flight after the intramural championships?

segments.speaker: 题目9
segments.text: Who will be at the student Leadership Conference?

segments.speaker: 题目10
segments.text: Can you turn down the volume?

segments.speaker: 题目11
segments.text: Why haven't you finished your math homework?

segments.speaker: 题目12
segments.text: What is the status of our student club registration?

segments.speaker: 题目1
segments.text: Is there enough space for everyone?

segments.speaker: 题目2
segments.text: It should be nice weather for the hiking club's trip today.

segments.speaker: 题目3
segments.text: Have you seen the new art exhibition at the student gallery?
